title: Death Counter
description: This mod adds a death counter to the bottom left of your screen that can be customized using a keybind.
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fbb52d4749f225f5e9d8a606be73cc91cebdfae.png)
This mod adds a death counter to the bottom left of your screen that can change color using a keybind. Simple as that! Enjoy!
